title: Live DEX Pair Stream
description: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch token launches the moment liquidity is added on Uniswap, PancakeSwap, Aerodrome, and other DEXs.
useCase: Build a real-time new token launch detector that fires instantly when a new DEX pair is created — catch launches before they go viral by subscribing to the newPairs stream.
